trivia_bullets.text: Drownyard Lurker is set on Innistrad's Nephalia coast, the same drowned reef where Drownyard Temple sits — the focal point Nahiri constructed to lure Emrakul to the plane. The card's flavor text is direct: 'When Emrakul arrived on Innistrad, even fossils answered her twisted call.' The creature is not a living organism but a reanimated ancient fossil corrupted by Emrakul's presence. The Drownyard as a location first appeared as the land card Nephalia Drownyard (Innistrad block).

A Scryfall search for t:eldrazi t:trilobite returns exactly one result: Drownyard Lurker. It is the only Eldrazi Trilobite in the entire game as of MH3. The Trilobite creature type entered MTG in Ixalan (Shore Keeper, 2017); MH3 is the first set to pair it with Eldrazi, using the corruption-of-a-real-organism pattern that defines MH3's brood flavor.

Drownyard Lurker is a Pauper-legal 7/7 with Vigilance at {7} — unplayable as a cast card in most formats but functional as a cycling payoff: cycling for {2}{U} generates an Eldrazi Spawn token regardless of whether the card enters the battlefield. The token's 'Sacrifice: Add {C}' ability feeds colorless mana for future Eldrazi plays. EDHREC rank: 12,359.
